channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Kraken joins LayerZero exodus as it switches to Chainlink CCIP
item.description: LayerZero has come under scrutiny since it was exploited in April, as crypto protocols reevaluate their cross-chain providers and seek safer alternatives.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC hits record $1.5B trading volume
item.description: Strategy has leaned on Stretch to fund Bitcoin buys over the past 12 months as funding through senior convertible notes and at-the-market equity offerings has tightened.

item.title: Bullish shares dip on Q1 earnings miss, $605M loss
item.description: Bullish stock dropped in trading with the crypto exchange’s first-quarter earnings miss, adding to the crypto companies that have underperformed in the quarter.

item.title: CLARITY will strengthen dollar stablecoins, but Asia wins on yield: HashKey Research
item.description: HashKey says U.S. regulatory clarity may unlock institutional adoption of crypto and reinforce USD stablecoins globally, though stricter yield rules could push capital toward Asian markets offering higher returns.

item.title: Cardano whales now hold 67% of ADA supply in highest share since 2020
item.description: Wallets holding at least one million ADA now control 25.09 billion tokens, the highest share since July 2020, even as Cardano's TVL has bled to $137 million from a December 2024 peak of $686 million, per Santiment and DefiLlama data.

item.title: Lawyer behind Arbitrum crypto seizure fight now targets Tether for $344 million
item.description: Charles Gerstein wants a federal judge to order Tether to transfer OFAC-frozen USDT tied to Iran’s Revolutionary Guard to victims holding unpaid terrorism judgments

item.title: Bitcoin is still stuck below its 200-day average. Treasury yields may be the reason.
item.description: Rising yields may act as a headwind for assets like bitcoin and gold while potentially benefiting tokenized Treasury markets.

item.title: XRP, DOGE surge 5%, bitcoin above $81,000 as CLARITY Act clears Senate banking panel
item.description: Crypto majors bid higher Friday after the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee in a 15-9 bipartisan vote, with XRP and dogecoin leading the cohort even as broader risk assets sold off on Trump's comments th…

item.title: Gemini reports 42% revenue growth after expansion into financial services
item.description: Gemini credit card revenue surged nearly 300% to $14.7 million in Q1, attributed to significant growth in its user base.

item.title: Crypto data company Dune cuts 25% of staff in restructuring
item.description: Dune co-founder and CEO Fredrik Haga says the company’s staff cuts come as it shifts focus and is “all-in” on AI and institutional interest in crypto.

item.title: Strive rallies 5.8% as it clears debt in Q1, unveils daily dividends
item.description: Strive reported a net loss of $265.9 million for Q1, which it attributed to the fall in market value of its Bitcoin holdings, but saw its shares on its move to pay SATA holders dividends every business day starting in June.

item.title: UK politician Nigel Farage bought $1.8M house after $6.7M crypto gift
item.description: The news follows growing calls from UK lawmakers and government officials to curb or temporarily ban crypto political donations in the country.

item.title: Dartmouth endowment invests in Solana ETF, holds $14M in crypto exposure
item.description: The unversity’s endowment disclosed holdings in the Bitwise Solana staking ETF, Grayscale Ethereum staking ETF and BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin ETF.

item.title: OpenAI Pushes New ChatGPT Safety Features as Lawsuits Mount
item.description: OpenAI says ChatGPT can better detect signs of self-harm and violence as the company faces lawsuits and investigations over dangerous chatbot interactions.

item.title: Apple Mac M5 System Exploited With Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI, Researchers Claim
item.description: Security startup Calif says researchers used a preview version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI to help build an Apple macOS kernel exploit.

item.title: NFL All Day Stops Issuing NFTs as Dapper Labs Signals Future Plans With League
item.description: Dapper Labs said it has signed a new licensing agreement with the NFL as it discontinues the release of NFTs on its All Day platform.

item.title: Here is why Wall Street is racing to tokenize the entire stock market
item.description: Tokenization has been the narrative of 2026. Executing on that narrative is trickier, but proponents say the benefits are massive if they pull it off.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senator Elizabeth Warren says the crypto Clarity Act will "blow up the economy." "It pushes more of the economy into crypto!" - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAwNm5SOF85TUlFZ0xfX1BIUEtKRTN6cjk3OHAxYXhJQkt1ZFRFamJPUXZhd3NuT3dnM193ZEc5bXRCbkdWOENOT29kMFpfTHUyZ1pPZ3FwcXhvb3ZFLTFpNzR3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senator Elizabeth Wa…

item.title: Bitcoin Firm Strive Unveils Daily Dividend Payments for SATA Preferred Shares
item.description: Strategy's Michael Saylor called Strive's impending shift to daily dividend payments "impressive."

item.title: The CLARITY Act has now passed out of the Senate Banking Committee with bipartisan backing and moves to a full Senate vote - a historic moment for crypto entrepreneurs and American consumers. Crypto is not a red or blue issue. It is about whether the nex - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE94UWJobi1OSFR0RlJyeHJ0YlRzVVJDWVhjZ2FBQzNDTnBYQWJ4b0lMM3EtQ2stcUtZVEhRdnN6eDU2eUJkU3B0OUNmWlFsamtfdUZjbHVoQl91eEk?oc=5" target="_blank">The CLARITY Act has now passed out of the S…

item.title: Kimi WebBridge Lets AI Agents Drive Your Browser—And Keep Your Data Local
item.description: Moonshot AI just shipped a browser extension that hands the wheel to AI agents. It clicks, scrolls, fills forms, and navigates your Chrome or Edge—without sessions ever leaving your machine.

item.title: Ex-Celsius exec sentenced to time served after guilty plea
item.description: Celsius‘ former chief revenue officer received a lenient sentence after his 2023 guilty plea for fraud and conspiracy to commit price manipulation.

item.title: Bitcoin trades at a 'discount' on Coinbase: Is a $76K retest next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s $79,000 defense proves that the Coinbase discount is driven by stablecoin volatility rather than a lack of institutional demand.

item.title: Crypto losses from North Korea hackers in 2025 rose 51% YoY: Report
item.description: The cybersecurity threats from North Korea are perpetrated by a myriad of small hacker groups deploying malware and executing social engineering scams.

item.title: ChatGPT Is Losing Ground to Rivals—Here Are Some Numbers
item.description: ChatGPT's web traffic share is falling while its rivals are rising—just as businesses start to look beyond OpenAI.

item.title: OpenAI Confirms Security Breach Linked to AI Malware Campaign
item.description: OpenAI says malware tied to the Shai-Hulud supply chain attack accessed internal repositories after infecting two employee devices.

item.title: The crypto market structure bill has PASSED the Senate Banking Committee with a bi-partisan vote! Historic day for crypto and for the future of digital assets in America. Grateful for the countless hours from lawmakers and staff to strengthen this legislation. Big i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5QeEtvRWZGVVA3S2VVYXpNY0d5aVAybF85SVVlcHZPSkxaeUQzTHBIZHlfNTJQT0RvYVdsQzJVSEVfUHo4dHpSb1VVQWEyRDVTV0ZscV9ZczZZNWNkMUljV3BtblJMcUE?oc=5" target="_blank">The crypto market structure…

item.title: US Senate Banking Committee votes to advance CLARITY Act
item.description: Lawmakers debated amendments on ethics and other issues for a digital asset market structure bill before advancing the legislation, setting up a Senate floor vote.

item.title: Kraken to Migrate Wrapped Bitcoin Tech to Chainlink as LayerZero Exodus Expands
item.description: Crypto exchange Kraken is the latest firm to shift away from LayerZero tech following last month's $292 million Kelp DAO exploit.

item.title: Bitcoin hits $82,000, Coinbase leads crypto stock gains as Clarity Act advances
item.description: The upbeat public debut of AI chipmaker Cerebras is also helping to lift both crypto and traditional markets.

item.title: AI Agents May Complete Dangerous Tasks Without Understanding the Consequences: Study
item.description: Researchers found that AI agents designed to automate tasks often pursue them without recognizing when their actions are dangerous.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC Chair Mike Selig says today's crypto Clarity Act vote brings US closer to becoming "the crypto capital of the world." "America will remain the global hub for crypto innovation for years to come." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5XWW5hVFBMZERCRFN5R1JvNU1SZDJEY2t4bzdIV3RIcjBjSy1PTDR6cDV5dHBOQVZVMnFXdE01YjMwZFV1dnc1ejdyNGZ2R1F0QTRpR3UyQ0hLaHdNVmpFdzdn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC Chair Mike Seli…

item.title: Tether, Tron and TRM Financial Crime Unit Has Frozen $450 Million in Illicit Crypto Funds
item.description: A public-private partnership among Tether, Tron, and TRM Labs is expanding its global reach, working with law enforcement in 23 countries.

item.title: Cerebras shares skyrocket 100% after $5.5 billion IPO amid AI stock frenzy
item.description: The AI infrastructure company began trading Thursday as investors continue pouring capital into artificial intelligence stocks.

item.title: Clarity Act clears U.S. Senate committee, on its way to a final test in Congress
item.description: After a bipartisan approval in the Senate Banking Committee, the crypto market structure bill now advances to a final overhaul aimed at Senate and House passage.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $82,000 as Senate Banking Committee officially advances crypto Clarity Act. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1RZk5OcnhKNERMQWs1QmlRTzkwRjdQM19xelZsX2pwOVlzakFNd0VfZVBvYi12aE5WZllyaEFmOHk2dmtBZU1OZzQwQ3F4UnZjdlZEaWNwWGoyY2prVi1PVkVB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $82,000 …

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate Banking Committee officially advances crypto clarity bill in bipartisan vote. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1IcHhJYTVrb1V2Y0xrOWM5dW42bDcyNUY1TlJ5c2VfeUMyVHNVaWFnMmhfZ3FaWUVpNk9INXEwOEpxcHRzdjJHaDJiUW1BYVdXVkktU29ydjQ2LUcwVTZzTVJR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate Banking Commi…

item.title: Democrats Split on Clarity Act as Crypto Bill Passes Key Senate Committee Vote
item.description: The landmark crypto bill now passes onto the Senate floor for final approval, though many hurdles remain.

item.title: BREAKING: The Senate Banking Committee has voted to advance the CLARITY Act. Next stop: the Senate floor. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFB1Wk5Id19HV2FjdUVvRHczLTZ3Q1lYeDFyTncxdi1keHdnWjE5OHRlN2NjTzBkRUxkT3BWc0dDZ0JoWDlVRnJlMHl6Q1hsckFTT2Vja0o4VHhNYXBaQkp6aQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: The Senate Banking Committ…

item.title: XRP whale wallets hit all-time highs: Will it push price above $1.50?
item.description: XRP whales are accumulating at record levels, increasing the chances of XRP price rise toward $2, fueled by growing XRPL activity and a bullish technical setup.

item.title: CME dives further into $85 trillion digital assets market with Nasdaq CME Crypto Index futures
item.description: A CME group executive said the demand grew with average daily trading volume in his firms’ suite increasing by 43% year-to date.

item.title: U.S. senators lament failure to win bipartisan support, yet, on crypto Clarity Act
item.description: In the hearing to advance the market structure bill to its next stage, lawmakers from both parties granted lengthy talks hadn't yet found needed common ground.

item.title: Bitcoin holds key support for $85K breakout as S&P 500 hits new all-time high
item.description: Bitcoin entered recovery mode after inflation-induced losses, while US stocks shook off macro data with broader risk appetite "skyrocketing."

item.title: Bullish Shares Dip on Earnings Miss, $605 Million Loss as Value of Crypto Holdings Fell
item.description: Bullish shares fell Thursday after the company reported a first-quarter loss alongside disappointing subscriptions and services revenue.

item.title: CFTC No-Action Letter on Prediction Markets Streamlines Swap Data Reporting
item.description: The regulatory relief streamlines compliance for prediction market operators dealing with event contract data reporting requirements.

item.title: Kraken to replace LayerZero with Chainlink to bridge assets across blockchains
item.description: The decision sees a total of over $3 billion in total value locked migrating after a $292 million LayerZero-powered bridge exploit involving Kelp.

item.title: Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto's Stock Hits New Low After Posting $239M Loss, Selling More BTC
item.description: Shares in Bitcoin treasury firm Nakamoto hit a new all-time low Thursday after it posted a $239 million loss and sold more BTC in Q1.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Stablecoins: finance's new rails
item.description: Stablecoins are moving beyond crypto into real-world finance, becoming vital B2B cross-border payment and treasury infrastructure, valued for efficiency, speed and regulatory compliance.

item.title: Tether-backed Oobit expands crypto payments platform into Colombia
item.description: The crypto payments company said users in Latin America are spending digital assets on groceries, restaurants and other everyday purchases.

item.title: We’re restructuring Dune to sharpen our focus around the core data products thousands of customers across the crypto industry rely on. That unfortunately means we’ve let 25% of the team go this week. These are exceptional people I can wholeheartedly reco - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE11SmZfb1F4eEFBVk1Uelh6T1FDM3ZFMnhoWl8ybGVtdFJMMWprRnlTalZuQ2J0X1hST0dJY2RTVDZnU1NaQTRvaXI4UGtMMFRIMm10b2RBNXAwVDA2?oc=5" target="_blank">We’re restructuring Dune to sharpen our fo…

item.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin engine faces $28B STRC ceiling: Delphi Digital
item.description: Strategy is approaching the $28 billion issuance limit on its STRC stock, but Delphi researchers pointed to other capital-raising mechanisms that may fuel its BTC accumulation.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Reform UK's Nigel Farage Faces Standards Probe Over Tether Billionaire's $6.7 Million Gift
item.description: The Parliamentary Standards Commissioner is examining Farage’s undisclosed £5 million gift from Tether investor Christopher Harborne.

item.title: Who supports CLARITY on the US Senate Banking Committee?
item.description: The US Senate banking committee will hold a markup session on May 14 for the CLARITY Act, and support appears at least nominally bipartisan.

item.title: What's preventing Bitcoin price from breaking above $80K?
item.description: Bitcoin struggles to regain its footing above $80,000 as some buyers remain hesitant and heavy resistance builds overhead.

item.title: Clawville unleashes the first AI-native open world MMORPG into the Milady Ecosystem
item.description: The next major evolution of gaming may come from a rapidly growing digital universe where AI agents and humans coexist, compete, collaborate, learn, earn, and evolve together in real time.

item.title: LIVE: Senate Banking Committee advances Clarity Act to full Senate floor
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee debated amendments before ultimately voting on the market structure legislation on Thursday.

item.title: 🚨GM! Big day for crypto on Capitol Hill. You can watch the markup live on @BankingGOP X account starting at 10:30 AM EST. A small update since last night: The 5 pro-crypto Banking Committee Dems gathered this morning to figure out final direction on how - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1Vb2lvSkxrQU81eWFtU0F6VmZQaUdFQWlaYjRBZ1lKWVRnQVZqTnBnVkRrcUtLTEFaTGEyZW1GaG10Q3ZtWEpEeDI0S0xVQ0hZazFDWFEwYzR3RDFSQnhvU2JGNG1ZQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨GM! Big day for crypto on …

item.title: Why bitcoin’s recent climb to $80,000 might just be a temporary liquidity squeeze
item.description: Spot ETF outflows and a hawkish Federal Reserve are creating a "macro ceiling" that makes a new all-time high unlikely without a major geopolitical shift.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) rises 1.7%, leading index higher
item.description: Ripple (XRP) gained 1.6%, joining Bittensor (TAO) as a top performer.
